title: rosa dumalis var. acharii
intro: Rosa dumalis var. acharii, also known as Achari Rose or Rosa acharii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa dumalis var. acharii include its potential to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make tea or oil infusions, and it can also be used as a raw ingredient in various traditional remedies.
